name: Johnny Long
org: Solutionary (acquired by NTT); Hackers for Charity (founder)
why_notable: Created Google Hacking as a formalized technique (2004) and built the Google Hacking Database (GHDB) — a community-maintained catalog of search operator queries that expose sensitive indexed content: open directories, config files, login panels, credentials in URLs, exposed cameras, router admin pages. Published Google Hacking for Penetration Testers, the foundational text. The GHDB migrated to exploit-db.com and now contains 6500+ entries. Later founded Hackers for Charity, applying security skills to humanitarian technology projects in Uganda.
